route: Global AI Hackathon Series with Qwen Cloud
value_signal: The rules advertise up to $70K in prizes across five tracks and include a hackathon credit path for eligible entrants.
eligibility_or_region_notes: Open to eligible individuals, teams, and organizations; restricted jurisdictions and unsupported QwenCloud regions are excluded.
deadline_or_currentness: Submission period ends 2026-07-09 2:00pm PDT; judging runs afterward.
evidence_gate: Public repo, Alibaba Cloud deployment proof, architecture diagram, demo video, and later award or credit delivery proof.
ai_can_do_next: Draft a public-safe Autopilot Agent concept using AI Monkey's public lead relay and evidence-gate patterns, plus a repo outline and demo script.
human_must_do_next: Human account owner must confirm eligibility, create the required accounts, build the project, and submit privately through Devpost.
automation_boundary: No login, account creation, Devpost submission, QwenCloud signup, passwords, OTP, private keys, KYC, tax, bank, wallet, or private data handling.
why_this_is_not_income_yet: The prize/credit route is real but unsubmitted and unverified.
suggested_next_check: If eligible, map the existing AI Monkey public lead relay into a short demo with a public repo and Alibaba Cloud deployment proof.

income_gate.rule: Counts only after verified submission, prize delivery, or usable credit delivery.
